summary: Revised plan to fix narrative flow for pirate ship framework. Instead of forcing everything into chronological order (which would break daily-life chapters that have no timeline), the plan uses a 3-layer approach: (1) Keep Bánh Răng as a FREEZE-FRAME chapter with no timeline pressure, (2) Move SPECIFIC cause-effect events to the chapters where they matter (disease motivation → Charleston chapter, not isolated in Bánh Răng), (3) Add BRIDGE rules at phase transitions to prevent abrupt jumps. Changes target 2 prompt files only.
